English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Social Work Program records.
New York State College of Human Ecology. Social Work Program
Allen, Josephine Aona V.
23-24-3184
2.3 cubic feet. 2.3 cubic feet.
1975-2000. Correspondence, publications, photographs, and program and course material. Correspondence, publications, photographs, program and course material documenting the undergraduate Social Work Program that was in the Department of Human Service Studies in the New York State College of Human Ecology. Includes correspondence to and from Josephine Allen, professor in the Department of Policy Analysis and Management in the College of Human Ecology. Collection material in English 4129788
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Damon Clark
Date completed:
July 2, 2002
EAD encoding:
Damon Clark, July 2002
Date modified:
RMC Staff, October 2011
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, publications, photographs, program and course material documenting the undergraduate Social Work Program that was in the Department of Human Service Studies in the New York State College of Human Ecology. Includes correspondence to and from Josephine Allen, professor in the Department of Policy Analysis and Management in the College of Human Ecology.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Publications/Manuals Box 1 and Box 2, Folder 1
Series II. Programs/Workshops Box 2, Folders 2-8
Series III. Course Material Box 2, Folders 9-15
Series IV. Accreditation Material Box 2, Folders 16-23
Series V. Correspondence Box 2, Folders 24-27
Series VI. Alumni Material, Awards, Handbooks Box 3, Folders 1-7
Series VII. Fieldwork Placements Box 3, Folders 8-16
Series VIII. Memorabilia Box 4
Cite As:
Social Work Program records, #23-24-3184. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Social sciences -- Study and teaching. Social work education. New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Human Service Studies New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Policy Analysis and Management
